purpose: Provide a server-side evidence script because production SSH is out of scope and the active goal still requires server pull/deploy, production preflight, and realistic Real Backend Test evidence.
defaultPinningPolicy: No hard-coded default SHA. The script fetches origin/main and derives the target SHA at run time.

frontend.digest: resolved at run time from GHCR manifest

backend.digest: resolved at run time from GHCR manifest

scriptGuarantees: Defaults to the latest fetched origin/main instead of a hard-coded commit SHA
Allows EXPECTED_MAIN_SHA=<40-char-sha> when an exact deployment pin is required
Uses immutable sha-${resolvedShaShort} runtime image tags unless image override env vars are set
Resolves GHCR manifest digests before compose pull
Runs docker compose pull and up
Fails on stale public list DTO keys
futureUiSlice: Work and Study search should update related results while the user types, not only after pressing Enter.
